'''''Goroth: Slave of the Empire''''' is a book for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' written by [[Nigel D. Findley]]. It was published by [[West End Games]] in [[1995]].

It is set between [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]] and [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].<ref name="Date">In ''Goroth: Slave of the Empire'', [[Jered Pole]] is noted as having joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] "two [[Standard year/Legends|years]] ago." As the Alliance was formed in [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]] per ''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' and became the [[Alliance of Free Planets]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] per ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'', ''Goroth: Slave of the Empire'' must be set between [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]] and 4 ABY.</ref>

{{Book-stub}}

==Publisher's summary==
''Four thousand years ago, Goroth was a beautiful trade world. Caught between two warring factions that coveted its resources, Goroth was too difficult to occupy, yet too valuable to remain free. The solution was destruction. Now the native Gorothites are beginning to rebuild their civilization, but they are caught between The Empire and The Rebel Alliance. Will they suffer the same fate again? A Star Wars Supplement. Published by West End Games. 1995 Lucasfilm Ltd.''
